reasoning: I am voting for Biswajit Das and AITC because Lakshmir Bhandar has come on time every month — even through all the troubles and news stories I saw on Facebook — and that is not something I can ignore. The TMC panchayat people are the ones who make things work here in Bangaon, and they know my family. I do not fully understand the big politics — CAA, Delhi arrests, all of that — but I know that here, when I need something, it is the TMC network that helps. My husband's family votes this way, and in 2019 it was Kanyashree and the bicycle that changed my life. Shantanu Thakur is the minister, yes, but he is far away in Delhi, and I do not know how his promises reach my house the way the Lakshmir Bhandar already does.
primary_drivers: Lakshmir Bhandar arrives on time consistently
Local TMC panchayat network is what actually functions for my family
Personal benefit from past schemes (Kanyashree, bicycle) under Mamata
